name: Admizz Education
headline: Admizz deploys Zunkiree Search for student self-service
description: Admizz integrated Zunkiree Search to help students find answers instantly, reducing support ticket volume while improving satisfaction scores.

name: CoreCloud365
headline: CoreCloud365 transforms documentation with AI search
description: CoreCloud365 replaced their legacy search with Zunkiree Search, enabling customers to find answers through natural language queries instead of keyword hunting.

name: Carbon Spark
headline: Carbon Spark powers internal knowledge search
description: Carbon Spark integrated Zunkiree Search to make their internal documentation searchable. Employees now find answers in seconds instead of searching through folders.
